title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
